'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 41''' was the forty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 9]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Supreme Chancellor election, 32 BBY/Legends|Election of a Supreme Chancellor]]
*Madame [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - [[Geonosis droid factories/Legends|The Droid Foundries]]
*[[Espionage droid|Espionage Droids]]
*[[Vibroblade/Legends|Vibroblades]]
*[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Punworcca 116-class interstellar sloop/Legends|Solar Sailer]]
